selection_constraints.selection_goal: Approximately 100 public LC-MS files spanning multiple Workbench studies, instruments, ion modes, and methods, all individually extractable and <= 2 GB.

download_interface.per_file_download_note: Use --data-urlencode for F because some archive paths contain spaces or plus signs.

smoke_test_runs.notes: This file completed quickly enough for a live end-to-end test; several larger Workbench files were too slow to transfer interactively.
